name: Breakfast Sausage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage and drain.
2. Butter a 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. Butter 6 slices of bread and place them in the pan with the buttered side down.
4. Sprinkle the bread with sausage, then cheese.
5. Butter 6 more slices of bread and place them on top of the sausage and cheese mixture.
6. In a bowl, mix together eggs, half and half, salt, and dry mustard.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the bread, sausage, and cheese.
8. Set the casserole in the refrigerator overnight.
9. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake for 1 hour.
11. Let the casserole set for 20 to 30 minutes after removing it from the oven.
Teenagers like this dish, as it tastes a lot like pizza. It also freezes well and reheats nicely in a microwave.
